wordplay_note: Through the looking-glass — her drug use opens doors between realities
card_description: Alys Buckman (meaning "Alys = noble; variant of Alice") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Flow My Tears the Policeman Said*. Felix's sister and incestuous lover whose experimental drug use causes Taverner's reality shift. Name note: Through the looking-glass — her drug use opens doors between realities. Transgression and pharmacological reality-alteration as PKD's recurring themes. First appears in *Flow My Tears the Policeman Said*. Context: "Dick argues that *Flow My Tears* contains "cooked" (divinely inspired/interpolated) material that parallels the Book of Acts with impossible precision."
first_work: Flow My Tears the Policeman Said
work_list: Flow My Tears the Policeman Said
